channel.title: LCallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from LCallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Here's how the DHS shutdown could impact the lives of everyday Americans
item.description: A government shutdown hit the Department of Homeland Security, affecting TSA airport security, FEMA disaster relief, and immigration services nationwi...

item.title: There's a Small Problem With That List of Names a Dem Lawmaker Connected to Epstein
School, Who Needs School? LA HS Students Ditch Class for Anti-ICE Protest, Hit Officer in Head With Pole
Government shutdown hits DHS after Democrats blow up bipartisan funding deal over immigration uproar
item.description: DHS is in a partial shutdown after Congress failed to reach an agreement on immigration issues in time for its self-imposed deadline.

item.title: Nicki Minaj's Jest About Bribing Her 'Barbz' to Ensure SAVE Act Passage Prompts Media Meltdown
Feel-Good Friday: US Olympic Ice Duo Shows What Love, True Partnership Are All About This Valentine's Day
'Fiction': House Republican campaign chair dismisses Democrats’ expanding GOP target map
item.description: House GOP campaign chair scoffs at Democrats' move to expand their midterm battleground map to 44 House districts in this year's battle for the House ...

item.title: 'Trump Is Temporary': California's Newsom Vies for Relevance, Green Cred at Munich Security Conference
Schumer's 'E. coli' burger photo resurfaces after another Dem's grilling skills get torched: 'What is that?'
item.description: Democratic Gov. Abigail Spanberger is being mocked for a photo of her grilling, with many on social media expressing alarm and disgust over the meat o...

item.title: Rubio steps into Munich spotlight as Trump leans on him to carry Vance’s populist message abroad
item.description: Marco Rubio attends Munich Security Conference following Vice President JD Vance's controversial 2025 speech that stunned European leaders and critici...
